items.briefing:
Dropbox has expanded its AI features, now integrating with ChatGPT and Claude. If your organisation uses Dropbox to store training materials or student records, be aware that connecting third-party AI tools may affect how your data is handled — review your privacy settings and check whether any sharing with AI services is enabled by default.

In other news, email scammers continue to be a concern for organisations of all sizes. Be cautious of unexpected emails requesting payments, login details, or personal information.

**Practical tip:** Before connecting any AI tool to a cloud storage service, check the app's data-sharing permissions first.

featured.title: Financial services faces most cyberattacks per device
featured.quote: Financial services sector faces highest cyberattack rates due to legacy systems and slow patching.
